nsgIds.value: [concat(createArray(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', format('nsg-{0}', variables('databricksPublicSubnetName'))), resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', format('nsg-{0}', variables('databricksPrivateSubnetName'))), resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', format('nsg-{0}', variables('azureMLComputeSubnetName'))), resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', format('nsg-{0}', variables('privateEndpointSubnetName'))), resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', format('nsg-{0}', variables('acaInfrastructureSubnetName')))), if(parameters('deployAKS'), createArray(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', format('nsg-{0}', variables('aksSubnetName')))), createArray()), if(parameters('deployAPIM'), createArray(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', format('nsg-{0}', variables('apimSubnetName')))), createArray()), if(parameters('deployBastion'), createArray(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', format('nsg-{0}', variables('jumpboxSubnetName')))), createArray()))]

nsgNames.value: [concat(createArray(format('nsg-{0}', variables('databricksPublicSubnetName')), format('nsg-{0}', variables('databricksPrivateSubnetName')), format('nsg-{0}', variables('azureMLComputeSubnetName')), format('nsg-{0}', variables('privateEndpointSubnetName')), format('nsg-{0}', variables('acaInfrastructureSubnetName'))), if(parameters('deployAKS'), createArray(format('nsg-{0}', variables('aksSubnetName'))), createArray()), if(parameters('deployAPIM'), createArray(format('nsg-{0}', variables('apimSubnetName'))), createArray()), if(parameters('deployBastion'), createArray(format('nsg-{0}', variables('jumpboxSubnetName'))), createArray()))]
